testcase.name: test_01_shift_overview_returns_all_kpis
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration18_shift_ops.py:56: in test_01_shift_overview_returns_all_kpis assert response.status_code == 200, f"Shift overview failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Shift overview failed: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
